instruction: Clarify the role of an attacker in exploiting this vulnerability.
input: Cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Quiz And Survey Master versions prior to 7.3.7 allows a remote attacker to hijack the authentication of administrators and conduct arbitrary operations via a specially crafted web page.
output: An attacker using a CSRF vulnerability can induce an authenticated user to execute unintended actions on a web application, exploiting the user's authenticated state.
